sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99450" key="sunaporri/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναπο-ρρίπτω</orth>, <sense id="n99450.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throw away along with</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
